title: alchemilla glabra subsp. alpestris
intro: Alchemilla glabra subsp. alpestris, also known as Alpine Lady's Mantle, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant's health benefits include soothing irritated skin, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Alpine Lady's Mantle can be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, allowing for a range of applications in natural skincare and healthcare.
